description: The Kyodo-kai is a yakuza group based in Hiroshima, Japan, formed in January 1969 by Kokichi Morita after the disbanding of its predecessor, the Takahashi-gumi. It is a designated yakuza group with an estimated 60 active members and is the second largest yakuza group in the Chugoku region. The group has been a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai since 1996.
